tasks.label: solution: pack and publish
tasks.command: echo "Executing all pack and publish tasks..."

tasks.label: library: coverage-verbose
args: export CSPROJ="tests/NW.NGramTextClassification.UnitTests/NW.NGramTextClassification.UnitTests.csproj"; export FLT="NW.NGramTextClassification"; set -euo pipefail; resultsdir="$(mktemp -d)"; reportdir="$(mktemp -d)"; cleanup(){ rm -rf "$resultsdir" "$reportdir"; }; trap cleanup EXIT; dotnet test "$CSPROJ" --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" --results-directory "$resultsdir" && reportgenerator -reports:"$resultsdir/**/coverage.cobertura.xml" -targetdir:"$reportdir" -reporttypes:TextSummary -assemblyfilters:+"$FLT" && cat "$reportdir/Summary.txt"

tasks.label: library: update-codecoverage
args: export CSPROJ="tests/NW.NGramTextClassification.UnitTests/NW.NGramTextClassification.UnitTests.csproj"; export FLT="NW.NGramTextClassification"; export SUFFIX="NW.NGramTextClassification"; set -euo pipefail; resultsdir="$(mktemp -d)"; reportdir="$(mktemp -d)"; cleanup(){ rm -rf "$resultsdir" "$reportdir"; }; trap cleanup EXIT; dotnet test "$CSPROJ" --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" --results-directory "$resultsdir" >/dev/null 2>&1 && reportgenerator -reports:"$resultsdir/**/coverage.cobertura.xml" -targetdir:"$reportdir" -reporttypes:TextSummary -assemblyfilters:+"$FLT" >/dev/null 2>&1; value=$(grep -oP "Line coverage:\s+\K\d+(\.\d+)?(?=%)" "$reportdir/Summary.txt" || true); if [ -z "$value" ]; then value="0"; fi; int_value=$(echo "$value" | cut -d. -f1); if [ "$int_value" -le 39 ]; then color="red"; elif [ "$int_value" -le 69 ]; then color="orange"; else color="green"; fi; url="https://img.shields.io/badge/coverage-${value}%25-${color}"; echo "$url" > "./codecoverage-${SUFFIX}.txt"; curl -s "$url" -o "./codecoverage-${SUFFIX}.svg" >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "coverage-${SUFFIX} updated successfully!" || echo "coverage-${SUFFIX} failed to update coverage badge."

tasks.label: cli: coverage-verbose
args: export CSPROJ="tests/NW.NGramTextClassification.CLI.UnitTests/NW.NGramTextClassification.CLI.UnitTests.csproj"; export FLT="NW.NGramTextClassification.CLI"; set -euo pipefail; resultsdir="$(mktemp -d)"; reportdir="$(mktemp -d)"; cleanup(){ rm -rf "$resultsdir" "$reportdir"; }; trap cleanup EXIT; dotnet test "$CSPROJ" --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" --results-directory "$resultsdir" && reportgenerator -reports:"$resultsdir/**/coverage.cobertura.xml" -targetdir:"$reportdir" -reporttypes:TextSummary -assemblyfilters:+"$FLT" && cat "$reportdir/Summary.txt"

tasks.label: cli: publish
tasks.command: for RID in linux-arm64 win-x64 linux-x64; do dotnet publish /p:PublishSingleFile=true /p:PublishTrimmed=false /p:DebugType=None --self-contained true -c Release -r $RID --output /home/nw.ngramtextclassification/temp/; done

tasks.label: cli: update-codecoverage
args: export CSPROJ="tests/NW.NGramTextClassification.CLI.UnitTests/NW.NGramTextClassification.CLI.UnitTests.csproj"; export FLT="NW.NGramTextClassification.CLI"; export SUFFIX="NW.NGramTextClassification.cli"; set -euo pipefail; resultsdir="$(mktemp -d)"; reportdir="$(mktemp -d)"; cleanup(){ rm -rf "$resultsdir" "$reportdir"; }; trap cleanup EXIT; dotnet test "$CSPROJ" --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" --results-directory "$resultsdir" >/dev/null 2>&1 && reportgenerator -reports:"$resultsdir/**/coverage.cobertura.xml" -targetdir:"$reportdir" -reporttypes:TextSummary -assemblyfilters:+"$FLT" >/dev/null 2>&1; value=$(grep -oP "Line coverage:\s+\K\d+(\.\d+)?(?=%)" "$reportdir/Summary.txt" || true); if [ -z "$value" ]; then value="0"; fi; int_value=$(echo "$value" | cut -d. -f1); if [ "$int_value" -le 39 ]; then color="red"; elif [ "$int_value" -le 69 ]; then color="orange"; else color="green"; fi; url="https://img.shields.io/badge/coverage-${value}%25-${color}"; echo "$url" > "./codecoverage-${SUFFIX}.txt"; curl -s "$url" -o "./codecoverage-${SUFFIX}.svg" >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "coverage-${SUFFIX} updated successfully!" || echo "coverage-${SUFFIX} failed to update coverage badge."
